LanguageData.Ammo_Railgun_BuckOE.label: railgun shell (Buck:OE)
LanguageData.Ammo_Railgun_BuckOE.description: Unlike other railgun rounds these require a casing to be used effectively, and unlike shotguns, the buckshot isn't as easily foiled by armor.
LanguageData.Ammo_Railgun_SlugOE.label: railgun shell (Slug:OE)
LanguageData.Ammo_Railgun_SlugOE.description: Unlike other railgun rounds these require a casing to be used effectively, and unlike shotguns, the buckshot isn't as easily foiled by armor.
LanguageData.Bullet_Railgun_BuckOE.label: rail buckshot pellet
LanguageData.Bullet_Railgun_SlugOE.label: rail shotgun slug (sabot:OE)
